macro.title: Fidelity’s 2026 retirement study shows shift to gig work, delayed retirement amid inflation
macro.what: Rising costs of living and debt are pushing many Americans to rethink retirement as a flexible, phased transition, with 72% now expecting to retire on their own terms.

notables.title: Compass seeks to dismiss TCPA lawsuit over agent calls
